project_description: Modernization of billing system written in COBOL (1990s). Migration of business logic to Java 17 + Spring Boot. Rewriting 200 COBOL programs, maintaining compatibility with output file formats, comparative regression tests (old vs new system running in parallel for 6 months), code documentation (no documentation in original).
client_history: Critical system, running continuously for 28 years. Zero documentation.
risk_patterns: COBOL migration without documentation — discovering hidden business logic is the biggest risk. +80%.
pm_comment: Project took 2x longer than planned — discovered 40 undocumented business rules.
